raw_comment:
I've noticed that there aren't as many players of color in the MLB than any other league, most likely due to the years of context behind the sport. I also noticed the NFL has the smallest proportion of coaches of color.

Headline: "Major sports leagues have made steps to diversify leadership, here are the results"
ace_sentences: I have noticed that there are not as many players of color in the MLB as in any other league.
This is most likely due to the years of context behind the sport.
I have noticed that the NFL has the smallest proportion of coaches of color.
Major sports leagues have made steps to diversify leadership, here are the results.
